_comment: Form field overlay style config. Edit this file to control appearance without touching app-edit-mode.js.
_keys: Supported property keys: backgroundColor, borderColor, borderWidth, borderStyle, cursor, color (text color — also overrides -webkit-text-fill-color, so it works on all browsers including readonly fields)
_priority: Within each mode: base → required → readonly → readonlyRequired (later entries win). focus and hover revert on blur/mouseleave. focus wins over hover (hover is ignored while element is focused).
_button: button.hover and button.click are ADDITIVE — only the listed properties change; nothing else is cleared. Use hover to set cursor, click to set visual feedback.
